hooks.command: echo '[Recent project activity]'; tail -25 'working files/changelog.md' 2>/dev/null || echo '(no changelog yet)'

echo '[Team-leader mailbox]'; any=0; for f in team-coordination/team-leader/from-product-owner.md team-coordination/team-leader/from-plant-nutrition-specialist.md; do entries=$(awk '/^## Entries/{flag=1; next} flag' "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d'); if [ -n "$entries" ]; then echo "--- $f ---"; echo "$entries"; any=1; fi; done; [ $any -eq 0 ] && echo '(empty)'; true

echo '[REQ ledger]'; max=$({ grep -hoE 'REQ-[0-9]+' team-coordination/req-ledger.md requirements.md 2>/dev/null; find nutrition yield-range -name 'spec.md' -type f -exec grep -hoE 'REQ-[0-9]+' {} + 2>/dev/null; } | sed 's/REQ-//' | sort -un | tail -1); echo "current max in tree+ledger: REQ-$max (next free: REQ-$((max+1)))"; echo 'last 5 ledger claims:'; grep -E '^[0-9]{4}-' team-coordination/req-ledger.md 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo '(ledger missing)'
